text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm eating lunch in the cafeteria,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...This is awful. They're out of saladagain. Sigh... There go my grandlunch plans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This is most interesting news.<n>The salad
has spoiled King's lunch...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But I'm first-rate, so I can't give upnow... Sigh. I guess I'll just haveto get my vitamins from some candiednuts.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Candied nuts?! H-how...<n>extraordinary! Does
she really eat<n>such extravagant-sounding food?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, no I can't. There has to be<n>something
more nutritious.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who's that whispering nearby? Is<n>that you,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How could I not? Thanks to all your<n>mumbling, I
can't even hear myself<n>think.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because of your lunch! I heard you<n>always eat
first-rate food!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I want to strive to eat<n>elegant
meals like yours... So I'd like<n>you to teach me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You mean you came here so that you<n>could learn
how to become a lovely<n>and sweet first-rate
Umamusume like<n>me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't you say something<n>sooner? I'd be
happy to mentor you. ♪<n>I'll lay out my entire
dietary plan for<n>you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
First up, get a pen and paper ready!<n>Time is
precious if you really want to<n>become first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In a surprising turn of events, they<n>both begin to
fervently discuss meal<n>plans.
